request.headers.description: LLM providers call HookEvent::RequestHeaders before each API request so plugins can inject custom headers (auth tokens, tracing IDs, etc.)

shell.env.description: BashTool queries plugins for additional environment variables before executing shell commands

config.description: Config loading triggers HookEvent::Config hook so plugins can observe/extend configuration
config.entry_point: AgentStack::run() serializes Config and dispatches trigger_hook(HookEvent::Config, cfg_value)
config.note: Notification-style: hook response not merged back into config (plugins observe, not override)

auth.description: Plugin auth sub-protocol (get_auth_methods, authorize, refresh_auth) exposed as AgentStack public methods
auth.note: authorize_with_plugin also calls router.update_credentials_for_provider() to persist the returned API key
